results.description: DA case: ED attaches properties worth Rs 53.28 cr of former Assam IGP Prasanta Kumar Dutta GUWAHATI, June 27: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has ordered that immovable properties worth over Rs 53 crore of a retired IPS officer be attached in connection with a disproportionate assets (DA) case.
